notes: Composio's docs surface three transferable ideas (meta-tool runtime discovery, native-vs-MCP token tradeoff framework, llms.txt AI-readable manifest) plus an event trigger dual-model. Retag strips the forbidden entry-type tag `pattern` and the near-redundant `documentation` taxonomic tag that duplicated source_type; reuses existing `composio`, `mcp`, `tool-integration`, `ai-agents`, and `orchestration` vocabulary; and introduces one new concept tag (`dynamic-discovery`, 6x recurrence across the corpus) that captures the core transferable mechanism. Applicability tags (`jason-os-relevant`, `cas-relevant`) make explicit the creator-view framing that patterns matter more than the product for this user.
